task: Add conservative adaptive fallback to recommerce LLM OJT selection

requirements.requirement: Lower thresholds gradually only when stricter scan returns zero
requirements.evidence: Three ordered selection profiles are evaluated independently: strict, adaptive_1, then adaptive_2.

requirements.requirement: Keep non-negotiable safety and commercial boundaries
requirements.evidence: Safe categories, restricted terms, product identity, LLM requirement, fail-closed behavior and supplier/shipping commercial block never relax.
selection_result and each candidate expose profile ID, label and adaptive selection note; frontend renders the label.
High-similarity selected product titles are deduplicated before rendering.

governance_bootstrap.summary: Applied real-entrypoint verification, completion evidence and no capital-action approval from OJT research.
Applied origin-main deployment, secret protection, atomic runtime writes and CEO-only Red Team rule.

verification.name: local adaptive live scan
verification.target: local Naver Shopping plus Ollama runtime
verification.result: passed: strict profile selected 0; adaptive_1 selected the 34-compartment organizer with LLM score 90, price spread 1.898 and allowable supplier cost 2,648 KRW.

verification.name: focused recommerce regression suite
verification.target: local recommerce selection and API tests
verification.result: passed: 20 tests including strict-first adaptive fallback and duplicate-selection prevention.

verification.name: frontend build and changed-page lint
verification.command: cd harness-os/frontend && npm run build && npx eslint src/pages/RecommercePage.tsx
verification.result: passed: production build and changed-page lint.

verification.name: Mac Mini production API and served bundle
verification.target: macmini backend API and port 5173 frontend
verification.command: Run production market scan, authenticated curl /api/recommerce/market-research, inspect served index-BfdKv5vP.js
verification.result: passed: API returned one adaptive_1 candidate, strict_candidate_count 0, score 90, price spread 1.898 and supplier ceiling 2,648 KRW. Served bundle contains selection_profile_label and port 8000/5173 are listening.

deploy.result: passed: Mac Mini backup scratch/pre_deploy_backup_20260719_210746, atomic frontend bundle index-BfdKv5vP.js, backend reload and scoped origin/main diff 0.

residual_risk: The selected item remains an OJT investigation target, not an inventory purchase recommendation; shipping, stock and wholesale terms are not present in Naver data.
